speaker: MATT
raw_text: The surprise round, they weren't expecting it. Roll initiative right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be right at the steps of the Margrave's manor.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I position myself about seven feet away from them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And I cast Thunderwave.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, (explosion), this burst of thunder comes blasting out centrally from where you are located, Scanlan. The DC on this, with your--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thunderwave. Oh, is it spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's spell, what's your DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Six fail, one succeeds on this save. So you hit them and they're all forced backwards, some of them up onto the stairs, some against the wall. Roll 2d8 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ragdoll physics.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's-- oh, that's, you're right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 11 plus something? No, I guess it's just 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's just 11. All right, and one of them takes five points of damage and (impact sound) looks down at this little gnome that's there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, no, I'm still invisible. It's not a concentration spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Invisibility, I'm pretty sure that as soon as you do--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The spell ends for a target that attacks or casts a spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Casts a spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Even though it's a concentration spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can cast other instantaneous spells, but as soon as you cast a spell you become visible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: High-level invisibility, improved invisibility is the one that remains.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh well, I'm fucked, then. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say, do you have Greater Invisibility?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No. I can cast it at a greater level, but no, I don't have Greater Invisibility.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, at that moment you suddenly become visible.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Roll with it, roll with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hi guys. Hi.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But you're Scanlan, you can do this.
